case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. STANISLAV HAS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HAS, STANISLAV DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-09-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAS, STANISLAV THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 801 HOWARD STREET, #609, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF DISMISSAL; FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAS, STANISLAV
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HAS, STANISLAV
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HAS, STANISLAV
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SET ASIDE DEFAULT/ VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
